projects.title: House of Al Saud, Diriyah Gate
projects.desc: Fit-out package for the Diriyah Gate exhibition — 70,414m² BUA.
projects.fullDesc: Comprehensive architectural fit-out design and documentation for the House of Al Saud exhibition pavilion within the Diriyah Gate Development. The project encompassed interior architecture, detailed construction drawings, and material specifications across a built-up area of 70,414 square meters.
scope: Coordination with MEP and structural disciplines

projects.title: E-Gaming Boulevard Gate
projects.desc: 14-meter landmark entrance gate with steel framework and foundation design.
projects.fullDesc: Structural design and engineering for a 14-meter-tall landmark entrance gate for the E-Gaming Boulevard. The project involved complex steel framework analysis, foundation design, and construction documentation for this iconic gateway structure.

projects.title: Six Flags Qiddiya CR1 Tunnel
projects.desc: Structural shop drawings including formwork layouts and reinforcement detailing.
projects.fullDesc: Preparation of comprehensive structural shop drawings for the CR1 Tunnel section of the Six Flags theme park at Qiddiya.
scope: Reinforcement detailing and bar bending schedules

projects.title: KAFD Signage Design
projects.desc: Signage structural design integrated with existing tower slab and columns.
projects.fullDesc: Structural design for signage systems at King Abdullah Financial District, requiring careful integration with existing tower slabs and columns.

projects.title: Business Square Riyadh
projects.desc: Structural design for residential villas with varying levels and elevations.
projects.fullDesc: Complete structural design package for a residential villa compound in Riyadh, featuring villas with varying floor levels and complex elevation profiles.

projects.title: King Salman University
projects.desc: Comprehensive structural shop drawings for the Diriyah Gate campus.
projects.fullDesc: BIM-based structural shop drawing production for King Salman University within the Diriyah Gate development.

projects.title: Ministry of Commerce, Al-Qurayyat
projects.desc: Full MEP design and documentation for the Ministry branch office.
projects.fullDesc: Complete MEP engineering design for the Ministry of Commerce branch office in Al-Qurayyat.

projects.title: Hilton Al Dail Jeddah Garden Inn
projects.desc: Value engineering for MEP systems — optimized cost and performance.
projects.fullDesc: MEP value engineering services for the Hilton Garden Inn in Al Dail, Jeddah.

projects.title: Residential Tower, KAEC
projects.desc: Architectural design and BIM coordination for a mixed-use residential tower.
projects.fullDesc: Full architectural design services for a high-rise residential tower in King Abdullah Economic City.

sections.heroSub: Delivering high-quality BIM-based digital modeling solutions for Architectural, Structural, and MEP disciplines across the Middle East.
sections.coreSub: Comprehensive engineering services across all disciplines — from concept design through construction documentation.
sections.featSub: A selection of mega-projects across Saudi Arabia showcasing our multi-discipline expertise.
sections.projSub: A selection of mega-projects across Saudi Arabia, showcasing our expertise in Architecture, Structural, MEP, and BIM disciplines.
